name: @mesaprotocol/cli
description: Mesa CLI — Command-line interface for creating, validating, and running Stellar financial workflow apps

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const file = 'dist/bin.js'; const content = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8'); if (!content.startsWith('#!')) { fs.writeFileSync(file, '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' + content); }"
